name: Loyal Metals Ltd
analysis: LLM has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.4218. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.4240 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.4218, stop A$0.4208, target A$0.4300. Risk/reward is 7.51:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
